sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116358" key="w(rodro/mhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὡρο-δρόμημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n116358.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">space traversed in an hour,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
